title: rosa viscaria var. rotundifolia
intro: Rosa viscaria var. rotundifolia, also known as round-leaved viscaria, is a perennial plant species within the rose family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rosa viscaria var. rotundifolia include relief from digestive issues and skin irritations, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
